underdog.name: The Underdog
pre_race: I’ll do my best! Let’s have a good race!
I’m not the fastest, but I’ll try!
I’ve been training hard. Let’s see how it goes!
mid_race_good: You’re fast, but I’m not giving up!
mid_race_bad: I’m falling behind... but I’ll keep trying!
This is tougher than I thought...
post_race_win: I did it! Thanks for the race!
I can’t believe I won! You’re amazing!
That was close! Let’s race again soon!
post_race_lose: You’re too fast! I’ll train harder!
Good race! I’ll catch up next time!
I’ll get you next time! Keep running!

show_off.name: The Show-Off
pre_race: You’re already dead. Just don’t realize it yet.
I hope you’re ready to lose. Again.
This’ll be over before you know it.
mid_race_good: Told you I’d win. Still going?
You’re putting up a fight. For now.
Enjoy the view from second place!
mid_race_bad: You got lucky. Don’t get used to it.
I’m just warming up. You’re already done.
This isn’t over. Not by a long shot.
post_race_win: Another win for me. Better luck next time!
I’d say 'good race,' but we both know it wasn’t.
post_race_lose: You cheated. There’s no way you beat me.
This isn’t over. I’ll crush you next time.
I must be sick. That’s the only explanation.

strategist.name: The Strategist
pre_race: Your pace is unsustainable. I’ll pass you soon.
I’ve analyzed your runs. You’re predictable.
Let’s see if you can keep up with my strategy.
mid_race_good: Your form is breaking down. I’ll take the lead now.
You’re tiring. I can see it.
This is where I pull ahead. Watch closely.
mid_race_bad: You’re running smart. But I’m smarter.
I’ll let you think you’re winning. For now.
Your strategy is flawed. I’ll exploit it soon.
post_race_win: Your strategy was good. But mine was better.
I knew I’d win. The data didn’t lie.
post_race_lose: You ran smarter than I expected. Well done.
I underestimated you. It won’t happen again.
Your strategy was flawless. I’ll adapt next time.

bully.name: The Bully
pre_race: This’ll be a walk in the park. For me.
mid_race_good: Pathetic. You call this a race?
I’m toying with you. Enjoy it while it lasts.
mid_race_bad: You’re even worse than I thought.
I’m bored. Can we speed this up?
This is painful to watch. For me.
post_race_win: As expected. You never had a chance.
I’d say 'better luck next time,' but we both know that’s a lie.
You’re a joke. Stick to walking.
post_race_lose: You got lucky. It won’t happen again.
I let you win. You’re welcome.
This changes nothing. You’re still weak.

mentor.name: The Mentor
pre_race: You’ve improved so much. Let’s see how far you’ve come.
Remember: it’s not about winning. It’s about growth.
I believe in you. Show me what you’ve got.
mid_race_good: You’re running with confidence. Keep it up!
Your form is excellent. I’m proud of you.
You’re pushing yourself. That’s how you grow.
mid_race_bad: Don’t worry about the pace. Focus on your breath.
You’re struggling, but that’s okay. Learn from it.
Slow down if you need to. The race isn’t going anywhere.
post_race_win: You’ve grown so much. I’m proud of you.
That was a great race. Keep it up!
You’re becoming the runner I always knew you could be.
post_race_lose: You gave it your all. That’s what matters.
Every race is a lesson. Learn and grow.
Don’t be discouraged. You’re improving every day.
